title: デビュー戦の後に・倒したいアイツ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon has a magnificent debut race and is
practically overflowing with motivation after it
ends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a rival that she's hoping to compete with
at a big event, and that person is none other than
her peer Narita Brian, the current favorite for the
Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is raring to climb to new heights in
order to make her dream come true. We decide
to make the junior G1 Hanshin J.F. our next stop!
